tasks.subject: Fix setup.js syntax errors
tasks.description: Fix the syntax errors in `packages/1password-cli-tools/bin/setup.js` where backticks and dollar signs were incorrectly escaped (e.g., `\\`` and `\\$`), preventing the Node.js script from executing properly.

tasks.subject: Audit shell scripts and setup.js for syntax errors
tasks.description: Check all bash scripts in packages/1password-cli-tools/src and bin/setup.js for syntax errors or typos using bash -n and eslint.

tasks.subject: Audit TypeScript code for errors
tasks.description: Check packages/pi-1password/extensions/1password.ts for any TypeScript compilation errors or typos.

tasks.subject: Audit monorepo configuration and dependencies
tasks.description: Verify monorepo configuration, dependencies, and package.json files are correct for publishing.
